title: juno heldreichii
intro: Juno heldreichii, also known as Juniperus oxycedrus subsp. heldreichii, is a subspecies of the cedar-like evergreen tree Juniperus oxycedrus, native to the Balkan Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Juno heldreichii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and acting as a natural diuretic to alleviate urinary tract problems. Juno heldreichii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
